narrative: Middle East escalation and Hormuz transit risks drive a geopolitical risk premium — USD/JPY holds at 162.01 as 275bp Fed-BoJ carry offsets risk-premium demand; gold lower -0.81% near $4,080; equities +0.42%; DXY -0.03%; VIX 16.1. USD/JPY options show a moderate put skew (25d RR -1.38) as the market pays for protection against carry unwinds despite the spot bid. Watch BoC Rate Decision July 15 for the next G10 policy catalyst.
